pred_reason: The chosen labels are reasonable because the contract exhibits multiple arithmetic vulnerabilities fitting SWC-101 and insufficient validation for external calls aligning with SWC-107. These issues were confirmed through both static analysis and code review, indicating systemic weaknesses. Evidence: Integer overflow/underflow found in arithmetic operations (Finding 2).; Reentrancy risk identified due to unsafe external calls (Finding 1).; Access control flaws allow unauthorized external interactions (Finding 3).
